findings.claim: The Container App uses managed identity with resource-scoped, least-privilege RBAC for ACR and Key Vault secret access.
findings.detail: infra/modules/container-app.bicep assigns SystemAssigned identity and creates AcrPull on the registry plus Key Vault Secrets User on the vault, both scoped to the target resource and with principalType set to ServicePrincipal.

findings.claim: The deployer receives Key Vault RBAC needed to seed and verify secrets.
findings.detail: FIXED: deployerObjectId is now a required param in main.bicep and present in main.parameters.json (default empty string is overridden at deploy time). Role assignments activate when non-empty.

findings.claim: Cross-module wiring is complete for required params, outputs, and Key Vault-backed Container App secrets.
findings.detail: All required module params are supplied, referenced outputs exist, and the Container App secret names ssh-password and applicationinsights-connection-string both map to matching Key Vault secret resources in infra/modules/key-vault.bicep.

findings.claim: Scaffold warnings for BuildKit and native modules are addressed in generated artifacts.
findings.detail: containers/wetty/Dockerfile.azure avoids BuildKit cache-mount syntax, and the scaffold targets Azure Container Apps with a container image deployment path, satisfying W-BUILDKIT and W-NATIVE.

findings.claim: The generated Bicep compiles against current schemas.
findings.detail: az bicep build --file infra/main.bicep --stdout exited successfully, but emitted linter warnings for hardcoded Key Vault URLs and use of listKeys in the managed environment module.

findings.claim: The Container App probes target a valid non-redirecting health path.
findings.detail: FIXED: container-app.bicep now computes basePathTrimmed = endsWith(basePath, '/') ? substring(...) : basePath — probe uses /wetty (no trailing slash), which WeTTY registers directly and returns 200.

checks.name: bicep build
checks.detail: az bicep build --file infra/main.bicep --stdout succeeded; warnings only.

checks.name: managed identity RBAC review
checks.detail: The Container App managed identity has roleAssignments for ACR pull and Key Vault secret reads on the correct resource scopes.

checks.name: deployer Key Vault RBAC
checks.detail: No deployerObjectId is supplied, so deployer secret-seeding/read assignments are skipped.

checks.name: container apps cpu-memory pair
checks.detail: The template uses 0.5 vCPU and 1Gi memory, which is a valid Azure Container Apps pair.

checks.name: secretRef coverage
checks.detail: Every env secretRef matches a configuration.secrets entry.

checks.name: probe path review
checks.detail: The configured probe path /wetty/ redirects to /wetty, which Azure Container Apps probes do not follow.

checks.name: scaffold warning review
checks.detail: W-BUILDKIT and W-NATIVE are addressed, but W-HEALTH remains unresolved because the probe path still uses the redirecting trailing-slash route.
